special_page_types.when: Keyword matches day trip / day trips

global_exclusions: Spanish city or island token plus calendar month (EN/ES names)
Inter-city legs (Spanish micro-destinations, A to B patterns, or place+place+train/bus adjacent)
Package patterns (flight+hotel, villa+flight, all-inclusive, holiday package wording)
Resort/city holiday packaging without Spain country
FAQ-shaped keyword without Spain/España country anchor
notes: Things to do block requires Spain/Spanish/España in keyword plus activity OR food/culture/events regex.
Planning · Getting around splits to - City PDP when a city/island token appears without Spain country anchor.
Reuse: swap city token loader + country regexes for non-Spain lists.
